_comment: PUBLISHED reviewable surface — what OpenAI’s curated registry / ChatGPT app ACTUALLY serves to users today (verified 2026-07-16 from the installed openai-curated build, app asdk_app_6a0faef988b48191b843bac5cd170a9e).
